_source: Synthesised from v0 site (https://v0-mukund-venkat-website.vercel.app/) + revenue_model.json + verified facts from Mukund's WhatsApp reply 2026-04-28

positioning.headline: The Performance Coach behind high-achieving men.

bio.name: Mukund Venkat

career_milestones: 14 years in the fitness industry as a personal trainer
Thousands of clients coached over career (1000+)
Bodybuilding career concluded after 2019 — full focus on coaching
credentials_verified_by_mukund_2026_04_2.previous_misattribution_note: Previously displayed as 'Mr. India medallist' based on Deccan Chronicle 2019 — corrected to actual record per Mukund's own statement.

bio.background_arc: Indian-born → studied in London → ran gyms in Chennai → returned to London → competition career 2016-2019 (Singapore, Tamil Nadu, PCA Jersey, 2 Bros Pro British Champion) → full-time coaching since 2019

team.name: Dr Neel Reddy
team.availability: Top-tier programmes by request only — NOT bundled by default. Compliance-safe positioning.

team.name: Andras Thamas
team.availability: By request only — additional fee. Mukund hires him for the engagement when client requests dedicated mindset work.

compliance_notes.bloodwork: NOT performed in-house. Recommended via 3rd party (e.g., Medichecks/Medicare) for serious individuals. Charged additionally. Site copy rewritten to: 'For top-tier clients we layer in third-party bloodwork & biomarker testing through our clinical partners.' This avoids any unlicensed medical service claim.
compliance_notes.retreats: NOT yet run — aspirational. REMOVED from site copy. Future goal: travel-based retreats.
compliance_notes.longevity_claims: Soft references via Dr Neel Reddy ('longevity healthcare') only — kept compliant under ASA guidance because it points to a licensed clinician's separate service, not Mukund's deliverable.
medical_claims_to_avoid: 'Cellular health / longevity protocols delivered by Mukund' (only via clinical partner)

_pending_from_mukund: Mukund will share 5 best client wins separately — anonymised: rough age + occupation + what they wanted + what they got + how long it took. Plus permissions to use full names + photos for the testimonials above. He noted: 'I have some great Google reviews on Fitwithmukund but I need to change the name and page.'

method_pillars.title: Data, not guesswork
method_pillars.body: Structured assessments, measurable benchmarks, and outcome tracking. For top-tier clients we layer in third-party bloodwork & biomarker testing through our clinical partners — so we treat the body like a system, not a hunch.

method_pillars.title: Stage-ready discipline
method_pillars.body: Methods proven on the international physique stage — applied to busy professionals. Restraint over volume. Precision over noise.

method_pillars.title: Strength as foundation
method_pillars.body: Lean physique, athletic performance, and longevity all start with structural strength. We build the body that lets you do everything else better.

method_pillars.title: Coaching, not cheerleading
method_pillars.body: You're already driven. You don't need motivation. You need a system, structured accountability, and someone who has done it himself — at the highest level.

offer_ladder.name: The Performance Audit
offer_ladder.description: A diagnostic of your current state — physical, structural, and behavioural. You leave with a 14-day action plan, even if we never work together again.
offer_ladder.best_for: Anyone who wants the system without committing yet

offer_ladder.name: Online Transformation
offer_ladder.description: The signature programme. Custom training, nutrition, and weekly check-ins. Globally accessible. The most chosen tier — and the one most clients renew.
offer_ladder.best_for: Travel-heavy professionals, global clients, or anyone training in their own gym

offer_ladder.name: Hybrid Signature
offer_ladder.description: Online programme plus monthly in-person session in London. The 'best of both worlds' tier for high-accountability London-based professionals.
offer_ladder.best_for: London-based execs who need structure plus periodic in-person calibration

offer_ladder.name: Full In-Person Transformation
offer_ladder.description: 2-3 in-person sessions per week, full programming, nutrition, recovery oversight. The most intensive tier — a full body and lifestyle rebuild.
offer_ladder.best_for: London residents wanting the highest-touch experience

content_strategy_validation_2026_04_28.mukund_confirmation: Comedy works great — best for reach. Then educational. Skits with multiple characters work well.
content_strategy_validation_2026_04_28.implication: Confirms the 30% skits + 20% transformation + 20% talking-head mix already in content_strategy.html. No format changes needed. Specifically: invest more in multi-character skits (vs solo skits) since Mukund explicitly called out the multi-character format as effective.

brand_directives_from_mukund_2026_04_28: Reach ideal clients — not vanity audience

image_strategy_decision.decision: Use existing 17 curated images with editorial CSS treatments. NO face regeneration.
rationale: Face drift risk too high for a personal brand
Framing issues solvable via object-position, gradients, duotone overlays
Future shoot day to replace audit-flagged images with intentional studio shoot
